hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulated digital asset businesses with role-based access, audit-ready workflows, evidence integrity, and secure private cloud deployment tailored for enterprise trust and governance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness suffers without deployment control
problem_description: Enterprise compliance teams face challenges maintaining clear access governance and evidence integrity when audit logs and provider data reside across uncontrolled or fragmented deployment environments. This limits their ability to produce consistent, defensible audit trails and complicates bank due diligence and regulatory review preparation.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY creates a unified control layer that centralizes access governance, preserves evidence integrity, and consolidates audit logs so compliance teams can deliver consistent, defensible audit trails for enterprise readiness.
workflow_title: From deployment controls to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY structures access policies, audit logs, evidence retention and permissions into a controlled private cloud workflow for enterprise compliance readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another deployment. Controlled enterprise readiness
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral private cloud layer that supports role-based access, audit evidence, governance and bank due diligence for scalable institutional compliance.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled deployments, role-based access, and audit-ready evidence to meet enterprise governance, bank due diligence and operational security standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support private cloud enterprise readiness
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how role-based access controls support governance
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence packages

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, evidence and reports for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support private cloud deployment?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports secure private cloud deployment with role-based access controls, audit logs, evidence integrity and configurable governance for enterprise compliance environments.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision records and evidence packages to support audit readiness and defensible compliance review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacing them, integrating their outputs into one connected compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and structures their outputs into workflows, decisions, audit evidence and reporting without replacing them.
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity for enterprise-grade private cloud compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
